phrases.intent_en: Where is the painted door street?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a rua das portas pintadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ROOUH DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh peen-TAH-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Famous corridor featuring contemporary street art murals.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é a Rua de Santa Maria.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is Rua de Santa Maria.

responses.english: Good morning, it is Rua de Santa Maria.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
responses.local: Bom dia, é a Rua de Santa Maria.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Porta dos Pintores?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-ka ah POR-ta doos PEEN-TO-rees

likely_response.local: Perto dos murais da Rua de Santa Maria.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEHR-too DOOSH moo-REYESH DUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Near the murals on Rua de Santa Maria.

responses.english: Near the murals on Rua de Santa Maria.
responses.phonetic: PEHR-too DOOSH moo-REYESH DUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
responses.local: Perto dos murais da Rua de Santa Maria.

phrases.text_local: Onde está a praça do pelourinho?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TAH-ah PRAH-sah doo peh-loo-REE-nyoo (está a links: es-TAH-wah)
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional meeting point near historic religious landmarks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à Igreja de São Pedro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SOWN PEHD-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to São Pedro Church.

responses.english: Good morning, next to São Pedro Church.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SOWN PEHD-roo.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto à Igreja de São Pedro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de São Pedro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SOWN PEHD-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Fifteenth-century parish church with Manueline influences.

likely_response.translation_en: It is at Largo do Pelourinho.

responses.english: It is at Largo do Pelourinho.

phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a Porta dos Pintores?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DOOSH peen-TOH-rihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic gateway marking the traditional artist quarter.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia turístico no Largo do Pelourinho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo NOO LAH-ruh-goo DOO peh-loow-REE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the walking guide at Largo do Pelourinho.

responses.english: Ask the walking guide at Largo do Pelourinho.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo NOO LAH-ruh-goo DOO peh-loow-REE-nyoo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia turístico no Largo do Pelourinho.

phrases.text_local: Por onde devo começar para ver os murais da Rua de Santa Maria?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR OHNG-dih DEH-voo koo-mih-SAHR PUH-ruh VEHR OOSH moo-REYESH DUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH?

likely_response.local: Comece na Porta dos Pintores, o ponto de partida dos murais.
likely_response.pronunciation: koo-MEH-sih NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DOOSH peen-TOH-rihsh, AW POHNG-too DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duh DOOSH moo-REYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Start at Porta dos Pintores, the starting point of the murals.

responses.english: Start at Porta dos Pintores, the starting point of the murals.
responses.phonetic: koo-MEH-sih NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DOOSH peen-TOH-rihsh, AW POHNG-too DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duh DOOSH moo-REYESH.
responses.local: Comece na Porta dos Pintores, o ponto de partida dos murais.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the painted door street?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a rua das portas pintadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ROOUH DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh peen-TAH-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua de Santa Maria is famous for its painted doors, part of the 'Porta dos Pintores' project.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o bairro da Mouraria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW BEYE-roo DUH moow-ruh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic neighborhood known for traditional tasca counters.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, logo após a Porta dos Pintores.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, LAW-goo uh-PAWSH AH PAW-ruh-tuh DOOSH peen-TOH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, just after the Painters' Gate.

responses.english: Good morning, just after the Painters' Gate.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, LAW-goo uh-PAWSH AH PAW-ruh-tuh DOOSH peen-TOH-rihsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, logo após a Porta dos Pintores.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso reservar um tour de arte de rua?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zih-ruh-VAHR OONNG TOHWR DIH AH-ruh-tih DIH ROOUH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guia turístico na Zona Velha.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo NUH ZOH-nuh VEH-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a walking guide in the Old Town.

responses.english: Ask a walking guide in the Old Town.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo NUH ZOH-nuh VEH-lyuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um guia turístico na Zona Velha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Largo do Pelourinho is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Largo do Pelourinho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW LAH-ruh-goo DOO peh-loow-REE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Central square near the old municipal pillory.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Largo do Pelourinho.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-ruh-goo DOO peh-loow-REE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Largo do Pelourinho.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Largo do Pelourinho.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-ruh-goo DOO peh-loow-REE-nyoo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Largo do Pelourinho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Igreja de São Pedro is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de São Pedro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SOWN PEHD-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic parish church in Funchal's oldest district.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na Rua da Mouraria.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DUH moow-ruh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is on Rua da Mouraria.

responses.english: Good morning, it is on Rua da Mouraria.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DUH moow-ruh-REEUH.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica na Rua da Mouraria.
